calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners Hoi In Lao U and Lou Heng Lao were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the minor Un San Lao, who was also present at today's hearing.
Mia Chiu was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Sammie Un-San Lao.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
